title: C-TEC CFP — 2-Zone Conventional Fire Alarm Panel
body_html:
C-TEC CFP 2-zone conventional control panel for small commercial premises, shops and light industrial sites. LPCB approved, EN54-2/4 compliant with integral 1.5A PSU.

  • 2 detection zones
  • 2 sounder circuits
  • EN54-2 & EN54-4
  • Class change & alert inputs
  • Space for 2 × 12V 3.2Ah batteries

Guide trade price — confirm stock & live pricing.
